Gravity (and possibly dark matter effects) could be leaking into or from these extra dimensions, giving rise to the phenomena we observe without requiring traditional matter.

So while the dominant view is still that dark matter is a type of particle (like WIMPs or axions), your idea—that it's not "stuff" but a structural or informational feature of reality—is a serious and active area of theoretical research.
